title: All The Fun Staff - ATFS
description: 46 Mods || 4 Shaders || Create || Resource Pack in Update 2
body:
![ATFS || Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb2861d337545ce853f432562d5ce23a6c62a15_0.webp)

All the fun stuff or "ATFS" for short, was a project that is inspired by all the ATM Modpacks.

All the fun stuff has custom generation. We use the mod TerraBlender and Terralith. Thanks for these mods, You'll get a generation like no others.

---- Infomation ----

ATFS has 46 Mods as of now, as we expand this project, We'll bring the the customized modpack!

ATFS has no Custom Resource Pack as of now. We'll working our best to get 1 running!

---- What to do? ----

Well start off by getting some friends!, if not solo is fine.

Create the world and explore the different biomes and even get some fresh look.

Need more info? well maybe start a world..

Meh? who cares, Start by finding the villager, then, discover the big world generation, find big caves and explore an endless amount of wood.. and maybe stone.. (I hate stone btw)

After all that, enjoy your time with ATFS!!

What are you waiting for? Start your 2 week Minecraft phase with this pack!

---- FAQ ----

Q: Can I give mod idea for the mod pack?
A: Yes! Just comment on this pack!

Q: Am I able to play this with my friends?

A: Its a yes, We have added Essential and Simple Voice Chat for you guys to experience with your friends.

Q: Will this modpack be glitchy?

A: Maybe or maybe not, We'll try to fix all glitches.

Q: When will be the next modpack update?
A: As of now, We'll unsure of the date. We'll always update all the mods if they have any!

---- Credits ----

Owner : Darren

and that's it..
